name: Arena PLM & QMS API
what_it_does: Arena PLM REST API for cloud Product Lifecycle Management and Quality Management System platform. Enables AI agents to manage bill of materials and item management, handle engineering change order (ECO) and change management workflows, access quality event and CAPA management, retrieve supplier and approved vendor list (AVL) data, manage training and document control workflows, handle revision and release management, access design history file (DHF) and device master record (DMR) data, retrieve compliance and audit data, and integrate product data with ERP, CAD, and supply chain systems.
use_cases: Managing BOM and item data from product engineering automation agents
Handling engineering change orders from PLM workflow automation agents
Accessing quality events and CAPA from compliance management agents
Integrating product lifecycle data with ERP from manufacturing automation agents
not_for: Large enterprise manufacturing without cloud PLM and SMB-to-mid-market focus
Software product development without physical product BOM and change management
Non-manufacturing without product design and engineering data management
best_when: A hardware startup, medical device company, or electronics manufacturer using Arena wants AI agents to automate BOM management, engineering change workflows, quality management, supplier qualification, and ERP integration.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Product IP and BOM data is highly confidential. Medical device quality system data (DHF, DMR) is subject to FDA 21 CFR Part 820 and ISO 13485 regulations. Engineering change automation without proper review can introduce product defects. ITAR-controlled defense product data requires strict access controls.

auth.notes: Arena uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for API access. Workspace-level credentials with item, BOM, quality, and supplier scopes. Developer portal with API documentation. Webhooks for PLM and quality events. Acquired by PTC 2022.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — PLM subscription pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user and module subscription pricing; annual contracts
pricing.notes: San Jose, California. Founded 2000. Cloud-native PLM and QMS platform. Acquired by PTC (NASDAQ: PTC) 2022 for $715M. Used by 1,400+ companies in electronics, medical devices, and hardware. Strong medical device and FDA-regulated product focus. Competes with Propel PLM and Windchill for cloud PLM. Design history file management for medical devices.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: BOM and product IP is highly confidential — restrict API access to authorized engineers
Medical device 21 CFR Part 820 / ISO 13485 — engineering change automation must maintain validation status
PTC acquisition — platform evolution may affect API surface; verify current Windchill integration plans
No public MCP server — well-documented API key and OAuth2 REST API
21 CFR Part 11 electronic records — audit trail requirements for all PLM changes in regulated environments
ITAR-controlled product data — defense products may require additional access restrictions
agent_readiness.security_notes: Product IP and quality data. SOC2, ISO13485, 21 CFR Part 11. OAuth2. US data residency. Medical device regulatory compliance.

security_score_components.security_notes: PLM and QMS data. SOC2, ISO13485, 21 CFR Part 11. OAuth2. US data residency. Medical device IP sensitivity.
